item.title: Quarterly Threat Report: Fourth Quarter, 2025
item.description: A majority of ransomware activity resulted from three leading groups. Beazley Security Labs also identified interesting trends with infostealers, including sophisticated techniques to deliver and obfuscate the malware, along with new entrants rising to fill demand.

item.title: Top Threats for 2026 (Webinar Replay)
item.description: Drawing on expert insights and forward-looking analysis from our cyber specialists, we explore the trends and risks that will define 2026, and what they mean for your organization.

item.title: Cyber Crisis Simulation (Webinar Replay)
item.description: Tabletop simulations are one of the most effective ways to prepare before an incident strikes. In this recorded session, we cover the critical decisions that need to be made in response to an incident and best practices to reduce impact.

item.title: Guide to AI Readiness
item.description: Artificial intelligence is transforming the way organizations operate, creating new opportunities—and new risks. We cover 5 essential pillars of building a resilient AI strategy that will help you stay ahead.

item.title: The First 48 hours of a Cyber Incident (Webinar Replay)
item.description: When a cyberattack strikes, every minute counts. In this expert-led webinar, we help you understand the critical decisions and coordination needed in the first 48 hours of a cyber incident.

item.title: Chasing A Ghost: A PXA Stealer Story (Webinar Replay)
item.description: Attackers are evolving – but so are defenders.

item.title: AI Readiness: Building Resilience for What's Next (Webinar Replay)
item.description: Our experts cover how your organization can securely and ethically integrate AI technologies.

item.title: Microsoft 365 Security: 5 Smart Ways to Strengthen Your Cyber Defenses
item.description: While Microsoft 365 continues to play a central role in driving productivity and collaboration across modern businesses, its extensive capabilities come with increased complexity and a broad range of configuration choices, and the default configurations may not offer the best protection for your organization.

item.title: Ghost in the Zip | New PXA Stealer and Its Telegram-Powered Ecosystem
item.description: Beazley Security Labs and SentinelLabs collaborated to investigate a complex delivery & execution chain leading to PXA Stealer.

item.title: Protecting Corporate Data: Secure Remote Work and BYOD Access (Webinar Replay)
item.description: With more employees working remotely and using personal devices, the risk to corporate data has never been higher. Learn how to get ahead.
